tools.Name: Hermes Agent
tools.Description: A self-improving AI agent with a built-in learning loop that can persist knowledge, search past conversations, and create skills autonomously.
tools.Use_Case: Task automation, personal assistance, and complex workflow orchestration across cloud and local environments.

tools.Name: DeepTutor
tools.Description: An agent-native platform for personalized tutoring that integrates chat, research, quiz generation, and math animation in a unified workspace.
tools.Use_Case: Automated educational support, structured learning paths, and managing RAG-based knowledge bases for students or professionals.

tools.Name: MLX-VLM
tools.Description: A specialized package for running inference and fine-tuning Vision Language Models (VLMs) optimized for Apple Silicon (MLX).
tools.Use_Case: Performing multi-modal analysis (images, video, audio) efficiently on local Mac hardware.
